## 🚢 Release Impact

<!-- Markiere genau eine Option -->

- [ ] major - Breaking API/CLI/config contract change
- [ ] minor - Backward-compatible feature
- [ ] patch - Backward-compatible fix
- [ ] none - Docs, tests, chores, or internal-only changes

## 🔐 Security-sensitive changes

- [ ] No security-sensitive changes
- [ ] Touches downloader/network/cookie handling
- [ ] Touches dependency, CI, or security configuration
- [ ] Touches secrets, credentials, tokens, or private data handling

## 🧪 Tests
